headline: How Upbeat Earnings Revisions And Revenue Outlook At Ventas (VTR) Has Changed Its Investment Story
summary: In the past week, analysts raised their earnings estimates for Ventas ahead of its upcoming quarterly report, now expecting earnings of US$0.91 per share and revenues of US$1.58 billion, both higher than a year earlier. This combination of upward estimate revisions and projections for stronger year-over-year revenue and earnings growth has reinforced confidence in Ventas’ near-term operating momentum. headline: What's in Store for Mid-America Apartment Stock in Q1 Earnings?
summary: MAA to report Q1 2026 results on April 29. Renewals above 5% and 95%+ occupancy may offset weak new-lease pricing as Sun Belt supply eases.

headline: UDR Set to Report Q1 Earnings: What's in Store for the Stock?
summary: UDR to report Q1 2026 results on April 29, after market close, as strong renewals, mid-96% occupancy and easing concessions set a steadier start to 2026.

headline: DLR Q1 Earnings Beat on Leasing Momentum and AI Demand, View Raised
summary: DLR beats Q1 estimates as leasing strength, record backlog and strong demand drive growth, prompting a higher 2026 outlook.
